essay: School uniforms are a good idea. They make mornings easier because students do not waste time choosing clothes. Uniforms also reduce bullying about brands and money. Some people say uniforms remove freedom, but students can still express themselves in many other ways. For these reasons, schools should require uniforms.

i think phones in class is bad. because people get distracted and dont listen. also games. but sometimes phones are good for looking things up. teachers should decide. thats my opinion and there are many reasons.

Okuma alışkanlığı çok önemlidir. Kitap okumak kelime dağarcığını geliştirir ve hayal gücünü artırır. Ayrıca insan farklı dünyaları tanır. Bazıları kitap okumak sıkıcı diyor ama doğru kitabı bulunca çok keyifli oluyor. Bu yüzden her gün biraz okumalıyız.
